meta.source: County Health Rankings & Roadmaps analytic + national releases

tables.state_ranks: year, state_abbr, metric, n_counties, median_value, mean_value, min_value, max_value
tables.state_measures: year, state_abbr, measure, n_counties, median_value, mean_value, min_value, max_value

sql_examples: SELECT state_abbr, median_value FROM state_ranks WHERE year = 2023 AND metric = 'Health Outcomes Rank' ORDER BY median_value ASC LIMIT 15
SELECT year, AVG(median_value) AS avg_median FROM state_measures WHERE measure = 'Adult Obesity' GROUP BY year ORDER BY year
SELECT state_abbr, mean_value FROM state_measures WHERE year = 2025 AND measure = 'Life Expectancy' ORDER BY mean_value DESC LIMIT 10
